title: bee dispatch prepare: one source of truth for bee-owned dispatch payloads (GH #22 P0-3, D1/D2)
action: PRECONDITION REFACTOR (advisor R1): extract the model-guard's decision logic into a pure exported function — new skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/dispatch-guard.mjs (or equivalent lib module mirrored into hooks scope) exporting evaluateDispatch(toolName, toolInput, root) plus the anchored marker regex; hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs main() becomes a thin wrapper calling it (byte-mirror .bee/bin/hooks copy; test_model_guard must stay green). Then the new registry group dispatch with verb prepare (templates/lib/command-registry.mjs + handler in templates/bee.mjs + templates/lib/dispatch-prepare.mjs). Inputs: --runtime codex|claude, --kind cell|gather|reviewer|advisor, --cell <id> (required for kind cell), --json. PURPOSE MAP (advisor A1): kind cell -> resolveTier(root,'generation',runtime,{for:'cell'}) (or the cell's pinned tier); kinds gather/reviewer/advisor -> {for:'gather'} (read-only gather-shaped); kind advisor resolves its MODEL via resolveAdvisor (state.mjs:1279+), never bare resolveTier ('advisor' would coerce to generation at :1247); a cli-shaped tier for kind cell surfaces the typed cli_tier_gather_only refusal verbatim (D2). Prompt from the Worker Prompt Template shape for cell; template-consistent shapes for the others. Payloads: codex -> {tool:'spawn_agent', payload:{agent_type:'worker', message:'[bee-tier: <t>]\n<prompt>'}} (marker at message start); claude -> {tool:'Agent', payload:{subagent_type pinned per tier (bee-gather/bee-extract/bee-review; general-purpose only for ceiling), model when resolveTier type=model, prompt marker-anchored, description '<kind> (<model>)'}}. Output {tool, payload, dispatch_id, economics per D3 (field name channel, not transport — advisor R3)}. PREPARE-TIME RECORD (advisor R2): prepare appends its own economics record {dispatch_id, source:'prepare', kind, cell, ...economics} to .bee/logs/dispatch.jsonl — the guard's later line is the separate enforcement audit; no correlation needed. Tests (scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs): feed prepare's codex output through the REAL evaluateDispatch as {tool_name:'spawn_agent', tool_input: out.payload} (advisor A2) and assert accept; claude payload through the claude branch; unmarked message denied; cli-cell refusal; advisor-kind resolves the advisor model not generation; registry bijection. 4-way mirrors + manifest.

truths: prepare's codex payload passes the live model-guard's own accept path (tested by invoking the real guard code, not a copied regex)
prepare's claude payload carries pinned subagent_type + model per config and passes the guard's claude branch
kind cell against a cli-shaped tier returns the typed cli_tier_gather_only refusal verbatim
every prepare emits a dispatch record with economics fields and a dispatch_id
registry bijection + examples green; mirrors byte-identical; manifest green

verify: node scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: dispatch prepare shipped with the guard's decision core extracted to an exported evaluateDispatch (one source of truth, proven by feeding prepare's payloads through the real guard), purpose map honoring cli gather-only + resolveAdvisor, economics with channel field, prepare-time audit record
trace.verification_evidence:
# g22-1 — done report (bee dispatch prepare + exported dispatch-guard)

Worker: g22-1-worker (sonnet, isolated worktree). Worker commit `66e8d51`,
merged into main (clean; manifest regenerated post-merge to 362 files).
2026-07-19.

## What shipped
- **Guard refactor (advisor R1)**: `templates/lib/dispatch-guard.mjs` exports
  `ANCHORED_TIER_MARKER_RE` + `evaluateDispatch(toolName, toolInput, root)`
  covering every branch (claude pinned-type/marker+param/budget/bare-deny +
  codex spawn_agent rules, fail-open unobserved shapes). The hook is now a
  thin wrapper with identical exit codes/messages/audit lines —
  test_model_guard passes with ZERO edits (55 rows).
- **`bee dispatch prepare`** (`dispatch.prepare` group): purpose map per
  advisor A1 (cell→for:'cell'; gather→for:'gather'; reviewer→review slot;
  advisor→resolveAdvisor, never bare resolveTier); cli-shaped cell →
  `cli_tier_gather_only` refusal verbatim; cli-shaped gather/reviewer/advisor
  → `{tool:'Bash'}` external-executor payload; codex spawn_agent payload with
  guard-anchored marker; claude Agent payload with pinned subagent_type from
  the guard's own PINNED_AGENT_TYPE (one source of truth); economics uses
  `channel` (advisor R3), `effective_model` null at prepare time; prepare-time
  record appended to dispatch.jsonl with `source:'prepare'` (advisor R2).
- Tests: scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs 15/15 — headline: prepare's own
  payloads through the REAL evaluateDispatch (allow), then mutated (deny);
  test_bee_cli gains the dispatch group + example execution (181/0).
- Mirrors 4-way + rendered trees + manifest.

## Verification (fresh command output)
Independent orchestrator re-run on main post-merge:
test_dispatch_prepare 15/15; test_model_guard ALL PASS; test_bee_cli 181/0;
lib_mirror PASS; manifest --check 362 match → G221_VERIFY_GREEN.

## Deviations (accepted)
- `kind=advisor` uses the `advisor` label as marker token/logical_tier in its
  payload template; today's guard vocabulary doesn't round-trip it (advisor
  is deliberately outside CONFIGURABLE_SLOTS) — no test claims otherwise;
  extending the guard vocabulary is a future decision.
- verify-chain/manifest-suite registration of test_dispatch_prepare left for
  the feature close (chain edit is a config change, done once).

## Diff
29 files changed, 3843 insertions(+), 491 deletions(-).
